note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 4.0 cm x 2.2 cm x 1.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 26% slough, 74% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Continue current dressing regimen.

Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left foot measures aprx 4.0 x 2.2cm, depth 1.5cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 2.4x1.3, 0.8cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
